movies.title: Blow Out
movies.synopsis: A movie sound recordist accidentally records evidence that proves a car accident was actually murder, then finds himself pulled into the danger around it.

movies.title: Escape from New York
movies.synopsis: In a dystopian future, ex-soldier and criminal Snake Plissken is sent into Manhattan, now a maximum-security prison, to rescue the U.S. President.

movies.title: Ghost in the Shell
movies.synopsis: A cyborg policewoman and her partner hunt a mysterious hacker known as the Puppet Master in a networked future where identity and consciousness are unstable.

movies.title: The Big Sleep
movies.synopsis: Private detective Philip Marlowe is hired to investigate blackmail and becomes trapped in a dense web of gambling debts, murder, and organized crime.

movies.title: The Outfit
movies.synopsis: After robbing a mob-owned bank and serving time, Earl Macklin is released from prison and starts a private war against the crime organization behind it.

movies.title: Blade Runner
movies.synopsis: A blade runner is sent to find and terminate four escaped replicants who have returned to Earth in search of their creator.

movies.title: Point Blank
movies.synopsis: After being double-crossed and left for dead, Walker returns with a single-minded objective: recover the money stolen from him.

movies.title: Patlabor: The Movie
movies.synopsis: A rogue military robot threatens Tokyo while members of Special Vehicle Section 2 uncover a conspiracy tied to the city's new technological infrastructure.

movies.title: Hardware
movies.synopsis: A scavenged robot head rebuilds itself into a killing machine inside a claustrophobic post-apocalyptic apartment.

movies.title: Vanishing Point
movies.synopsis: A former race driver delivers a Dodge Challenger across the American Southwest while pursued by police in an increasingly existential chase.

movies.title: Year of the Dragon
movies.synopsis: A volatile New York police captain wages a brutal campaign against rising Triad power in Chinatown.

movies.title: The Crow
movies.synopsis: Murdered musician Eric Draven returns from the dead to avenge himself and his fiancée in a rain-soaked industrial city.

movies.title: The Old Man & the Gun
movies.synopsis: An aging bank robber continues escaping prison and charming everyone around him while pursued by a detective who grows fascinated with his lifestyle.

movies.title: Body Double
movies.synopsis: A struggling actor becomes obsessed with a mysterious woman and witnesses what appears to be her murder.

movies.title: Dark Passage
movies.synopsis: A man wrongly convicted of murdering his wife escapes prison and hides in San Francisco while searching for the real killer.

movies.title: X
movies.synopsis: A group of filmmakers shooting an adult movie on a rural Texas farm are stalked by the elderly owners of the property.

movies.title: The Raid 2
movies.synopsis: An undercover cop infiltrates Jakarta's criminal underworld after surviving a brutal raid on a crime lord's compound.

movies.title: Cat on a Hot Tin Roof
movies.synopsis: Tensions erupt inside a wealthy Southern family as resentment, alcoholism, inheritance, and repressed desires surface during a birthday gathering.

movies.title: The Wackness
movies.synopsis: A teenage drug dealer trades weed for therapy with a psychiatrist while drifting through first love, loneliness, and summer in 1994 New York.

movies.title: Black Rain
movies.synopsis: Two New York detectives escort a Yakuza member to Osaka and become trapped inside a violent conflict between rival Japanese crime syndicates.
